system.description: Cryosene heaters are portable space heaters that can provide enough heat to warm a small house with just a few rooms to above freezing. They are even warm enough to keep you from freezing outdoors if you keep close. They have 5 gallon tanks and can run for 2 Quarters from full. If used to warm a small space, such as a tent, to above freezing, the tank can last 4 Quarters from full.
